name: polymarket-price-canary
title: Polymarket Price Canary (Dry-Run Only)
description: Validates a small, fixed Polymarket condition manifest and builds the planned Gamma/CLOB request URLs (Gamma metadata, CLOB /prices-history, CLOB current-shape endpoints). This build is DRY-RUN ONLY: it makes zero network calls to Polymarket or any other external host. See project_context/SPEC_apify_polymarket_price_canary.md in rigolugo/pm_research for the full design and guardrail rationale.
